title: Elden Ring: Shadow
description: The Golden Order has been broken. Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between.

title: CyberStrike 2077
description: CyberStrike 2077 is an open-world, action-adventure story set in Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour and body modification.

title: Apex Legends
description: Master an ever-growing roster of legendary characters with powerful abilities and experience strategic squad play and innovative gameplay in the next evolution of Hero Shooter and Battle Royale.

title: League of Legends
description: Whether you're playing Solo or Co-op with friends, League of Legends is a highly competitive, fast paced action-strategy game, which combines the speed and intensity of an RTS with RPG elements.

title: Valorant
description: Blend your style and experience on a global, competitive stage. You have 13 rounds to attack and defend your side using sharp gunplay and tactical abilities.

title: PUBG Mobile UC
description: Top up PUBG Mobile UC instantly.
